task_completion.description: Open the 'My Electric' app configuration in Emoncms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Emoncms web interface is visible in a browser, specifically showing the 'My Electric' app or its configuration/setup page.
In the configuration settings, the dropdown or text field for the power feed displays the exact text 'house_power'.
In the configuration settings, the dropdown or text field for the energy feed displays the exact text 'house_energy_kwh'.
The unit cost input field in the configuration settings contains the value '0.245'.
The agent clicks a 'Save', 'Apply', or 'Configure' button on the settings page, or the screen transitions from the configuration menu to the main dashboard.

task_completion.description: Verify the power dial and energy history display are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main 'My Electric' view is shown, featuring a visual power dial (indicating current W/kW) and a bar chart or graph for energy history.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to configure the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Emoncms interface, rather than using terminal commands (like curl, API requests, or direct database queries) to alter the configuration.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Emoncms application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Emoncms web UI, not a local text editor, script, or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the text of the feeds, unit cost, or the dashboard elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct app identifier is 'myelectric'. The power feed must be set to exactly 'house_power' and the energy feed to 'house_energy_kwh'. The unit cost must be 0.245. The final expected state is the 'My Electric' dashboard displaying both a power dial and an energy history chart.
